goal: 更新 README 和静态站的 CLI/skill 安装说明

summary.title: Reframe cxs README and site around agent memory retrieval
summary.what: Updated README.md and site/index.html to separate CLI and agent skill installation, remove stale Claude Code not-implemented wording, and make the static site a concise why-plus-install page centered on cxs as a retrieval layer for agent work history.
summary.why: The user wanted the public-facing material to lead with the product thesis: agent-heavy work already creates the most useful memory in session transcripts, and agents can iteratively search, inspect, refine, and read evidence without relying on a heavyweight embedding-first knowledge base.
summary.user_goal: 更新 README 和静态站的 CLI/skill 安装说明

decisions.chose: Lead with cxs as a local session-history retrieval layer built for agents that investigate step by step.
decisions.rationale: This captures the user-supplied CXS versus QMD distinction: cxs is strongest when useful work history exists in conversations rather than curated docs.

decisions.chose: Reduce the site to why cxs exists plus CLI and skill install commands.
decisions.rationale: The user explicitly said the site did not need many command examples and should focus on why CXS matters and how to install it.
rejected: Keeping the previous workflow, JSON examples, and command reference blocks on the homepage

decisions.chose: Document npm CLI installation and agent skill installation as separate commands.
decisions.rationale: The npm package only ships CLI files; the agent skill package is installed with npx skills add and neither path installs the other.

review_notes: Validation run before commit: git diff --check, npm run check, npm pack --dry-run, and browser readback of the static site including mobile width.
Post-commit seal snapshot reported a clean worktree and changed only README.md and site/index.html.
No CLI behavior, API surface, schema, package version, or skill package source was changed.

architectural_claims: cxs is positioned as a local-first retrieval backend for agent session history.
The static site now treats why-plus-install as the primary public-facing surface.
npm CLI installation and agent skill installation remain separate distribution paths.
security_implications: Documentation continues to state local-only indexing with no daemon, no cloud, and no full transcript dump on the static site.
